description: Three equal-width columns without a separate slide title — the columns carry all content. Maximizes content area for three parallel topics.
usage: Use when you have three parallel content areas and want to maximize real estate. Suitable for feature comparisons, step-by-step breakdowns, or three key messages.
potential_usage: Works for three-tier architecture overviews, three-pillar strategy frames, or three product highlights.

placeholder_summary.TITLE_0: Main slide title — states the key message or topic
placeholder_summary.BODY_11: Subtitle, date, presenter name, or event description
placeholder_summary.BODY_12: Main content area — bullets, paragraphs, or structured content
placeholder_summary.SLIDE_NUMBER_10: Auto-generated slide number footer (do not edit)
placeholder_summary.BODY_13: Main content area — bullets, paragraphs, or structured content

content_suggestions.BODY_11: Subtitle text, date, or event name (1–2 lines)
